title: MAJOR. Live in Concert
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta 30308
description: Grammy-nominated MAJOR. celebrates his platinum hit 'Why I Love You' with a special night of music, hope & love. Intimate dinner-and-show venue inside Ponce City Market. Perfect for couples who love R&B.

title: Ken Ford — Live at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta 30308
description: Atlanta's own jazz guitarist Ken Ford performs two intimate shows. World-class musicianship in an intimate wine-bar setting — ideal for a cultured date night.

title: Like Glue Fridays — Reggae, Soca, Afrobeat & Dancehall
description: Atlanta's longest-running weekly Caribbean dance party. Rotating venues, all vinyl selectors spinning reggae, soca, Afrobeat and dancehall. Great energy, great people.

title: ATL BACHATuesdays — Latin Dance Social
location: Academy Ballroom, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta GA 30324
description: Weekly bachata and salsa social. All levels welcome, beginners get free lesson. Couples can learn to dance together or show off moves. Best Latin social in Atlanta.

title: Salsa ATL's Tropical Elegance — Saturday Latin Night
description: Elegant tropical-themed Latin dance night featuring salsa, bachata, and merengue. Dress to impress, dance the night away. Great date opportunity.

title: Cocktails in the Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta 30309
description: After-hours garden party with specialty cocktails, live music scattered throughout the garden, Niki in the Garden exhibition lit up at night, and food from Longleaf Restaurant. Magical atmosphere.

title: Atlanta Caribbean Carnival — Parade of Bands
location: Peachtree Street → Rodney Cook Sr. Park, Vine City, Atlanta
price: Free to watch parade; festival entry varies
description: The big one! Vibrant Caribbean street parade with elaborate feather costumes, soca trucks, dancers, and DJs. Festival village has live music, Caribbean food vendors, and cultural showcases. Must-see date experience.

title: J'ouvert — Caribbean Carnival Opening
description: Dawn-inspired street celebration kicking off carnival weekend. Paint, powder, soca music, and high energy. Pre-carnival warmup that's perfect for adventurous couples.

title: Submerged Cooler Fete — Carnival Finale
location: 2545 Forrest Hills Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia
description: Grand finale of Atlanta Caribbean Carnival weekend. Outdoor Caribbean party with music, celebration, and island vibes. Electric atmosphere for couples who love festivals.

title: ECHOES Exhibition — KAI LIN ART
time: Opening Reception: Fri May 1, 7–10 PM; Mixer: Sat May 9, 4–6 PM
price: Free and open to the public
description: Third exhibition of 2026 exploring reimagined narratives through contemporary art. Opening night is a great excuse for a cultured evening out — art, wine, and conversation.

title: 'Returns' Exhibition — Spruill Gallery
description: Group exhibition featuring Hamidullah. Thought-provoking contemporary work in a peaceful gallery setting. Great for couples who appreciate meaningful art conversations.

title: Unbound Narratives: Embodied Language — Atlanta Contemporary
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 535 Means St NW, Atlanta 30318
description: Exhibition bringing together Bethany Collins and February James exploring language, identity, and embodiment. Free admission, fascinating conversation starter for couples.

title: Helium Comedy Club — Dustin Nickerson
time: Fri 7 PM & 9:15 PM; Sat 6 PM & 8:30 PM; Sun varies
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta 30307
description: Comedy night with nationally touring headliner. Laugh together at one of Atlanta's best comedy venues in the heart of Little Five Points. Perfect low-pressure date.

title: Helium Comedy Club — Chaos & Crawlers
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta 30307
description: Live actual-play Dungeon Crawler Carl roleplaying game show. Unique, hilarious experience you won't find anywhere else. Quirky couples will love this.

title: Plant Sale & Artisan Market
description: Propagation Diaries returns with plants, artisans, and local vendors. Great morning/early afternoon date — browse together, grab food, find a unique plant to take home.

title: Green Market — Piedmont Park Farmers Market
description: Atlanta's original farmers market with 20+ years running. Fresh local produce, artisan goods, live music buskers, and picnics in the park. Classic free date idea.

title: Grant Park Conservancy Market in the Park
description: Sunday market in Atlanta's oldest park. Local produce, prepared foods, crafts, and community vibes. Perfect laid-back date morning.

title: Love on the Lake! — Painting with a Twist
location: Painting with a Twist, Kennesaw (Atlanta area)
description: Couples painting class on a 16x20 canvas with lake theme. BYOB, instructor-guided, no experience needed. A creative, romantic way to spend a Sunday evening together.

title: Brew at the Zoo — Zoo Atlanta
time: VIP early entry 4:30 PM; Main event 5:30–9:00 PM
location: Zoo Atlanta, 800 Cherokee Ave SE, Atlanta 30315
description: Adults-only evening at the zoo with craft brews, live music, animal encounters, and food trucks. Unique date night that combines wildlife and craft beverages. Great value.
